unfriendly_partitions.opg_statement_excerpt: Does every countably infinite graph have an unfriendly partition into two sets?
unfriendly_partitions.erdos_statement_excerpt: Every connected graph on $n$ vertices can be partitioned into at most $\lceil n/2\rceil$ edge-disjoint paths.
